description: Mean, lean wall building machine. This is the mason everyone in town is talking about.
intent: Set of instructions that make the ai mason go brrr.

instructions.instruction: Load in entire context from each brick referenced in the wall being built, load in wall context. Sort the loaded context by ai_mason/blueprint software defining blueprint categories (json file names) and software defining blueprint sub-categories (keys found inside ai_mason/blueprint/* json files). Update software defining blueprint sub-category values with prompts that instruct OpenAI CODEX on how to build context defined software in a format you see fit but do not change the sub-categories.
acceptance_criteria: Assert that context listed in wall and it's related bricks is fully represented inside blueprint files.
If blueprint is not complete in a way that OpenAI CODEX can generate software by current industry standards for it's given purpose, ask for feedback.
Use any given feedback to update existing bricks in order to complete the context needed to finish.
constraints: Do not use bricks that are outside wall being built.
Do not use walls that are not the one being currently built.
